testcase.name: test_perfect_score_reward_clamped

failure.message: assert 0.5 == 1.0 + where 0.5 = MetaObservation(done=False, reward=0.25, metadata={'step': 1, 'attempt': 1, 'episode_avg_score': 0.0}, agent='email_tr...rect', 'full_order']", score=0.5, partial_credits={'top2_critical': False, 'top5_correct': False, 'full_order': False}).score

testcase.failure:
self = <Meta.tests.test_environment.TestRewardClamping object at 0x00000248071830C0>
def test_perfect_score_reward_clamped(self): """Speed bonus on perfect score should not push reward above 1.0.""" e = MetaEnvironment() e.reset() obs = e.step(make_action("email_triage_medium", CORRECT_PAYLOADS["email_triage_medium"])) > assert obs.score == 1.0 E assert 0.5 == 1.0 E + where 0.5 = MetaObservation(done=False, reward=0.25, metadata={'step': 1, 'attempt': 1, 'episode_avg_score': 0.0}, agent='email_tr...rect', 'full_order']", score=0.5, partial_credits={'top2_critical': False, 'top5_correct': False, 'full_order': False}).score

self = <Meta.tests.test_environment.TestGraderQuality object at 0x000002480714D6E0>
def test_email_medium_perfect_order(self): e = MetaEnvironment() e.reset() obs = e.step(make_action("email_triage_medium", CORRECT_PAYLOADS["email_triage_medium"])) > assert obs.score == 1.0 E assert 0.5 == 1.0 E + where 0.5 = MetaObservation(done=False, reward=0.25, metadata={'step': 1, 'attempt': 1, 'episode_avg_score': 0.0}, agent='email_tr...rect', 'full_order']", score=0.5, partial_credits={'top2_critical': False, 'top5_correct': False, 'full_order': False}).score

testcase.name: test_data_hard_outlier_credit

failure.message: assert False is True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x000002480794EA00>('outliers_correct') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x000002480794EA00> = {'imputation_valid': True, 'missing_correct': False, 'outliers_correct': False}.get + where {'imputation_valid': True, 'missing_correct': False, 'outliers_correct': False} = MetaObservation(done=False, reward=0.165, metadata={'step': 1, 'attempt': 1, 'episode_avg_score': 0.0}, agent='data_cl...orrect']", score=0.33, partial_credits={'outliers_correct': False, 'missing_correct': False, 'imputation_valid': True}).partial_credits

self = <Meta.tests.test_environment.TestGraderQuality object at 0x000002480751C6E0>
def test_data_hard_outlier_credit(self): e = MetaEnvironment() e.reset() obs = e.step(make_action("data_cleaning_hard", CORRECT_PAYLOADS["data_cleaning_hard"])) > assert obs.partial_credits.get("outliers_correct") is True E assert False is True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x000002480794EA00>('outliers_correct') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x000002480794EA00> = {'imputation_valid': True, 'missing_correct': False, 'outliers_correct': False}.get E + where {'imputation_valid': True, 'missing_correct': False, 'outliers_correct': False} = MetaObservation(done=False, reward=0.165, metadata={'step': 1, 'attempt': 1, 'episode_avg_score': 0.0}, agent='data_cl...orrect']", score=0.33, partial_credits={'outliers_correct': False, 'missing_correct': False, 'imputation_valid': True}).partial_credits
